CLM_BENE_PD_AMT 

LABEL: Carrier Claim Beneficiary Paid Amount 

DESCRIPTION: The amount paid by the beneficiary for the non-institutional Part B (carrier, or DMERC) claim. 

SHORT NAME: CLM_BENE_PD_AMT 

LONG NAME: CLM_BENE_PD_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: XXX.XX
